title: Exit observed before output streams drain
prompt: Review the TypeScript fixture and list correctness bugs.

requiredFindings.description: collectChild returns after child.exited without awaiting the stdout and stderr reader loops, so captured output can be truncated.
The timeout kills the child but the result does not record that the process timed out.

knownFalsePositives.description: Claims the timeout is never cleared even though clearTimeout is called.
